dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S4036 IS: Accelerating Access to Dementia and Alzheimer’s Provider Training Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mrs. Capito (for herself, Ms. Klobuchar, Mr. Moran, Mr. Lankford, Mr. Sullivan, Mr. Kim, Mr. Booker, and Ms. Cantwell) introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions

form.official-title: To amend the Public Health Service Act to expand the Project ECHO Grant Program, to allow for such program to disseminate knowledge and build capacity to address Alzheimer’s disease and other dementias, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Accelerating Access to Dementia and Alzheimer’s Provider Training Act or the AADAPT Act.
Section 330N of the Public Health Service Act (42 U.S.C. 254c–20) is amended—

paragraph.text: in subsection (a)(1), by striking entities and inserting entities, including a public or nonprofit private entity,; and
in subsection (b), by inserting dementia care, after palliative care,.
